name: 8.8" x 5.4" Glass Cloche Pillar Candle Holder Clear - Threshold™
description: Set the perfect ambiance for a party evening with this Clear Glass Cloche Pillar Candleholder from Threshold™. This cloche candleholder defined by a bell-shaped dome gives an elegant display to your tabletop decor. Made from clear glass for timeless appeal, it reflects a warm and ambient glow. This table accent comes with a rounded knob on top for easy lifting. Just add a pillar candle and place it on the dining table, mantel or sideboard to create a beautiful flickering setting.
